allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
chore: add directory structure for data, analysis, forecasting, ai packages

Skeleton for Phase 1+ modules with empty __init__.py files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add DataAdapter ABC and core Pydantic models

- DataPoint, TimeSeries, DataSourceInfo models in schemas.py
- DataAdapter abstract base class with async fetch\(\) interface
- Tests for all models and ABC instantiation guard

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
